title: The Way Angels Die
wikitext:
[]: The Way Angels Die             Quote Post by jojojoker » Tue Aug 31, 2010 10:43 am It seems that everytime an angel dies in NME, it just explodes into blood. This is different to NGE, especially with Shamshel, whom was able to be retained as a perfect "specimen". Of course, in NGE, it really depends how the angel is killed, too. I wonder why it was changed.

[]: Re: The Way Angels Die             Quote Post by Oz » Tue Aug 31, 2010 11:03 am jojojoker wrote: I wonder why it was changed.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Aug 31, 2010 11:22 am it looks badass and shit

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Aug 31, 2010 12:00 pm SOOOOOOOOOOO MUUUUUUUUUUUCH BLOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOD!!!!!! That's why.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Aug 31, 2010 1:02 pm Blood explosions are pure awesomeness.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Aug 31, 2010 1:12 pm SYMBELISMZ

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Aug 31, 2010 6:18 pm It's not "blood", at least not exactly. It's ACL. Call me back with congratulations when Q reveals this.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Aug 31, 2010 6:33 pm It's going to be AGA. Angel Generating Acid.
